mapper.select: SELECT ch.id, ch.user_id as userId, ch.user_question as userQuestion, ch.answer_source as answerSource, ch.ai_answer as aiAnswer, ch.rating, DATE_FORMAT(ch.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) as userNickname FROM chat_history ch LEFT JOIN user u ON ch.user_id = u.id WHERE ch.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ch.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, session_id, user_question, answer_source, ai_answer, knowledge_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{userQuestion}, #{answerSource}, #{aiAnswer}, #{knowledgeId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_history SET rating = #{rating} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id as userId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) as userNickname, u.avatar as userAvatar, COUNT(ch.id) as dialogCount, MAX(ch.create_time) as lastTime, (SELECT user_question FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = u.id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as lastQuestion FROM user u INNER JOIN chat_history ch ON u.id = ch.user_id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY lastTime DESC
